targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS "LTV %", margin_loan_balance AS "Margin Balance" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, ltv_pct AS "LTV %", margin_loan_balance AS "Margin Balance" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, COALESCE(margin_income_coverage, projected_monthly_income / NULLIF(monthly_interest_current,0)) AS "Coverage", buffer_to_margin_call_pct AS "Buffer %" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, COALESCE(margin_income_coverage, projected_monthly_income / NULLIF(monthly_interest_current,0)) AS "Coverage", buffer_to_margin_call_pct AS "Buffer %" FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

title: G04 LMI v2 - Margin Stress Trends
